description: Slip your feet into cosy comfort and up your running speed with ease in these black socks from nike. Engineered with arch support and offering a secure stable Fit, this pair offers exemplary comfort.  Ankle length socks made of 77% cotton, 22% nylon and 1% spandexHas a half cushion terry foot for exemplary comfort and shock absorptionInner arch support for a secure and stable fitCareMachine wash cold at 30 degreesUse a non-chlorine bleach if neededTumble dry lowDo not iron or dry clean
